description_long: This church features a compact rectangular stone structure with a steeply pitched, reddish-brown shingled roof and a prominent central steeple topped with a cross. The facade includes a decorative metal double door, flanked by two circular windows with ornate frames, and a small round window above the entrance. The steeple rises directly above the entrance, adding vertical emphasis and traditional ecclesiastical character. The walls are rendered in a gray stone texture, giving the building a solid, enduring appearance. Subtle decorative motifs are visible on the front gable, enhancing the church's visual appeal.
description: A small stone church with a steep reddish-brown roof, central steeple, ornate metal doors, and circular windows.
description_view_0: Front view showing the steep roof, central steeple, and two circular windows flanking the facade.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the decorative metal double door and the full height of the steeple above.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with the roof, steeple, and circular windows visible but no entrance.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the decorative metal double door and the steeple's prominence.
